title: astragalus diffusus
intro: Astragalus diffusus, also known as Huang Qi, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which enable the body to resist stress and disease. The health benefits of Astragalus diffusus include boosting the immune system, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular function. Astragalus diffusus can be prepared as a decoction, capsule, or powder for use in herbal medicine, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
